relabelled_senses.definition: To move out of the proper place; to come loose or be displaced.
Situated at large distances from one another; widely separated in space or time.

literal: to struggle to survive when facing mortal danger or severe injury
a prospect of success that depends on the ability to struggle or contend physically or competitively

relabelled_senses.definition: To remove or obliterate serial numbers or other identifying marks from a physical object in order to conceal its origin or make it easier to sell or traffic illicitly.
To eat, typically in a hearty, eager, or greedy manner.
Money, especially money obtained dishonestly or regarded as morally corrupting.
Extremely wealthy; possessing great wealth (often used with a negative or contemptuous connotation).
The final edited version of a film that is approved for release or distribution.
The right or authority to make the ultimate decision; the final authority whose determination is conclusive.
A proverbially informal maxim asserting that the person who finds lost or abandoned property is entitled to keep it, often used jocularly or to claim ownership.
A rhyming proverb meaning that those who find something may keep it while those who lost it must accept their loss; typically used humorously or to justify keeping found items.

literal: to feel sufficiently compassionate or moved to do something for another person

relabelled_senses.definition: To regain the physical ability to speak or to be able to produce speech after a period of silence or vocal inability.
To send the ball into the goal; to score a goal in sports played with a netted goal (especially association football/soccer).
Objects or aspects of life that are of higher quality, refinement, or delicacy compared with others.
A particular hour regarded as the best or most noteworthy in a given period.
To complete the use of or to be done with something.
The letter 'F' posted in an online chat or comment thread.
